title: Short title
doc_html:
§390.8. Short title

           R.S. 14:390 through 390.7 may be cited as the "Communist Propaganda Control Law."

           Added by Acts 1962, No. 245, §1.

§390.8.  Short title
R.S. 14:390 through 390.7 may be cited as the "Communist Propaganda
Control Law."
Added by Acts 1962, No. 245, §1.
